schema: WhichCity salary estimates — raw computation output

methodology.tier1: BLS OEWS May 2024 direct metro-area annual median (pre-tax USD)
methodology.tier2: Numbeo city salary × ILO ISCO group ratio × US intra-group ratio (developed countries)
methodology.tier3: Same as tier2 but for developing countries (lower ILO data quality)
methodology.netToGross: Numbeo after-tax salary converted using country-specific effective tax rates
methodology.intraGroupRatio: Derived from US BLS data: profession salary / ISCO group average within US
methodology.confidence: 0-100 score based on data source quality and directness
